title: Top Recurring GMP Audit Findings
alt: Checklist of the most common GMP inspection findings

items.label: Data integrity & ALCOA+
items.desc: Shared logins, unreviewed audit trails, overwritten records

items.label: Deviation & OOS investigations
items.desc: Investigations that stop at the first cause; open backlogs

items.label: Poor CAPA management
items.desc: Corrections not corrective actions; no effectiveness checks

items.label: SOPs vs actual practice
items.desc: Uncontrolled copies, expired reviews, missing versions

items.label: Contamination control & Annex 1
items.desc: No holistic CCS; weak aseptic technique and gowning

items.label: Supplier & self-inspection gaps
items.desc: Unqualified suppliers, stale agreements, superficial audits
